basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) has published the Junior Engineer (Civil) Notification 2026 on 7 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 8 Junior Engineer (Civil) positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 35 years and holding a High School Leaving Certificate (HSLC) with a 3-year Diploma in Civil Engineering or above from a Government-recognized Institution, along with computer proficiency and Mizo language proficiency, are eligible to apply online at the official Mizoram PSC website. The application process will be active from 7 May 2026 to 19 June 2026, and can

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: High School Leaving Certificate (HSLC) with 3 years Diploma in Civil Engineering or above from Government recognized Institution, Computer Proficiency, Mizo Language Proficiency.
qualification.details: High School Leaving Certificate (HSLC) with a 3 years Diploma in Civil Engineering or above from a Government recognized Institution. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by Mizoram Group A B C posts Service Recruitment Amendment Rules 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency (exempted if Mizo was studied in HSLC).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Junior Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Mizoram PSC Junior Engineer (Civil) posts is 19th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post is 18 years as of 1st January 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post is 35 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates applying for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a High School Leaving Certificate (HSLC) with a 3 years Diploma in Civil Engineering or an equivalent qualification from a recognized institution. Computer proficiency and Mizo language proficiency are also required.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post announced by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Mizoram PSC Junior Engineer (Civil) recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Junior Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post will be placed at Level-7 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Mizoram PSC Junior Engineer (Civil) recruitment will be based on a Direct Recruitment Examination.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains detailed information about the recruitment.
